flashcards.front: What is BATNA (Best Alternative to a Negotiated Agreement)?
flashcards.back: BATNA (Best Alternative to a Negotiated Agreement) is a fundamental concept in game-theory.

flashcards.front: Why is BATNA (Best Alternative to a Negotiated Agreement) important?
flashcards.back: BATNA (Best Alternative to a Negotiated Agreement) is essential for understanding Applications of Game Theory.
